title: telis pubescens
intro: Telis pubescens, also known as the Telis plant or Velvet Tree, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Telis pubescens include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing sore throats. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
